mapper.select: select m.schedule_no, m.schedule_title, m.schedule_status, to_char(m.schedule_startdate, 'yyyy.mm.dd') as scheduleStartdate, to_char(m.schedule_enddate, 'yyyy.mm.dd') as scheduleEnddate, m.schedule_visibility, m.member_no, (select count(*) from schedule_sub s where s.schedule_no = m.schedule_no) as placeCount, (select count(*) from nice n where n.post_no = m.schedule_no and n.post_board_fx = 'SR' ) as likeCount, (select l.addr1 from schedule_sub s join landmark l on l.content_id = s.content_id where s.schedule_no = m.schedule_no order by s.schedule_sub_date, s.schedule_sub_seq fetch first 1 rows only ) as firstAddr, (select listagg(l.mapx || ',' || l.mapy, ';') within group (order by s.schedule_sub_seq) from schedule_sub s join landmark l on l.content_id = s.content_id where s.schedule_no = m.schedule_no and l.mapx is not null and l.mapy is not null and s.schedule_sub_date = ( select min(schedule_sub_date) from schedule_sub where schedule_no = m.schedule_no ) ) as coords from schedule_main m where m.member_no = #{member_no} and m.schedule_status = 'Y' order by m.create_date desc

select schedule_no, schedule_title, to_char(schedule_startdate, 'yyyy-mm-dd') as scheduleStartdate, to_char(schedule_enddate, 'yyyy-mm-dd') as scheduleEnddate, schedule_visibility, member_no from schedule_main where schedule_no = #{scheduleNo} and schedule_status = 'Y'

select to_char(s.schedule_sub_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') as scheduleSubDate, s.schedule_sub_seq, s.content_id, l.title, l.addr1, l.firstimage, l.mapx, l.mapy from schedule_sub s join landmark l on l.content_id = s.content_id where s.schedule_no = #{scheduleNo} order by s.schedule_sub_date, s.schedule_sub_seq
mapper.update: update schedule_main set schedule_title = #{scheduleTitle}, schedule_startdate = to_date(#{scheduleStartdate}, 'yyyy-mm-dd'), schedule_enddate = to_date(#{scheduleEnddate}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') where schedule_no = #{scheduleNo} and member_no = #{memberNo} and schedule_status = 'Y'
